name: John Fanelli
currentRole: Vice President of Product Management, Rebellion Defense
formerRole: Vice President, Enterprise and Edge Computing, NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Held senior enterprise and edge computing roles at NVIDIA within the worldwide field operations structure overseen by Jay Puri. Led go-to-market efforts for enterprise segments
sourceNote: Publicly known NVIDIA VP-level executive in enterprise segment under field operations

name: Kimberly Powell
connectionToCompany: Led NVIDIA's healthcare vertical business, which falls under worldwide field operations reporting to Jay Puri, driving GPU adoption in medical imaging and drug discovery
sourceNote: Publicly known NVIDIA VP Healthcare; joined Recursion Pharmaceuticals as CEO

name: Greg Estes
formerRole: Vice President, Developer Programs, NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Ran NVIDIA's developer programs and partner ecosystem efforts, working closely with field operations leadership under Jay Puri to grow the CUDA and developer community
sourceNote: Publicly known NVIDIA VP-level leader in developer and partner programs

name: Bob Pette
formerRole: Vice President, Professional Visualization, NVIDIA Corporation
connectionToCompany: Led professional visualization business unit at NVIDIA, coordinating closely with worldwide field operations led by Jay Puri to drive Quadro and RTX enterprise adoption
sourceNote: Publicly known NVIDIA VP ProViz; moved to Microsoft industrial metaverse role

name: Manuvir Das
formerRole: Vice President, Enterprise Computing, NVIDIA Corporation
